title: Nostalgic Nether (Nether Mod Programmer Art)
description: Makes the textures of a few modern nether themed mods fit in with Programmer Art (Jadens Nether Expansion, Rubinated Nether, My Nether's Delight, ect)
body:
This pack changes a majority of the textures in [Jaden's Nether Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion), [Rubinated Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubinated-nether), and [My Nether's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/my-nethers-delight) to ones that resemble the style of pre-texture update Minecraft. Features a large amount of textures derived from [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp) (with permission). Some (albeit few) textures also derived from textures used in [Reminiscence*](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/reminiscence) (Reminiscence assets used with permission (Proof of Permission in images.))
(Rubinated Nether's Ruby Goggles texture based off of the create goggles texture from Create - World of Color)

- [Jaden's Nether Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion)
  - Blocks: 85%
  - Entities: 15%
  - Items: 50%
- [Rubinated Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubinated-nether)
  - Blocks: 90%
  - Items: 90%
- [My Nether's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/my-nethers-delight)
  - Blocks: 90%
  - Items: 90%


*Reminiscence Art + Reminiscence Fixes textures by drbruhmoments & bbali
